title: Entadopsis schlechteri
taxonomy: Entadopsis schlechteri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Leguminosae. It belongs to the tribe Phaseoleae and the genus Entadopsis. The species is further classified as a member of the subfamily Faboideae. Entadopsis schlechteri is native to tropical Africa, specifically in the regions of tropical West and Central Africa. The classification of Entadopsis schlechteri helps in understanding its evolution and relationship with other related species.
